topOpportunities.opportunity: Fast Spectrum Transmutation of Long-Lived Isotopes
topOpportunities.description: Partner with or develop fast reactor capability to transmute long-lived waste into shorter-lived or stable isotopes. Reduce waste repository requirements.
topOpportunities.roi: Waste volume reduction by 95%, valuable isotope recovery
implementation: Fast reactor design study (sodium or lead-cooled)
topOpportunities.strategic: Solves nuclear waste problem, enables true sustainability

topOpportunities.opportunity: Quantum Sensors for Ultra-Precise Neutron Flux Mapping
topOpportunities.description: Deploy quantum diamond NV-center sensors for unprecedented spatial resolution in neutron flux measurement. Enable better fuel performance.
topOpportunities.roi: Improved physics models, 1-2% power uprate potential
implementation: Quantum diamond sensors in instrument thimbles

topOpportunities.description: Replace manual control rod adjustments with RL agent trained in digital twin environment. Optimize for power stability, fuel efficiency, and safety margins.
topOpportunities.roi: 15-20% improvement in capacity factor, 30% reduction in operator interventions
implementation: Train PPO/SAC agent with multi-objective reward function
Hardware-in-the-loop testing with redundant safety systems
Gradual deployment: advisory -> supervised -> autonomous modes

topOpportunities.description: Create federated learning network across nuclear fleet. Share insights while preserving data privacy. Discover global optimization patterns.
implementation: Federated learning framework (PySyft or TensorFlow Federated)
Central aggregation server with differential privacy
Local model training on plant-specific data
Knowledge transfer for rare events and anomalies

topOpportunities.description: Couple high-temperature steam electrolysis to reactor for green hydrogen production during low-demand periods. Create new revenue stream.
implementation: Solid oxide electrolyzer cell (SOEC) system (100 MW)
Industrial customers or fuel cell vehicle supply

topOpportunities.opportunity: Physics-Informed Neural Network for Temperature Control
topOpportunities.description: Temperature variance detected. Implement PINN model to predict thermal dynamics 10 steps ahead, enabling proactive cooling adjustments.
implementation: Deploy edge TPUs for real-time PINN inference
Train on 5 years of historical thermal data
Integrate with existing SCADA via OPC-UA
Implement digital twin with 100ms update cycle

topOpportunities.description: Use D-Wave quantum annealer to solve NP-hard fuel shuffle optimization. Find globally optimal configurations in minutes vs. days.
implementation: Formulate fuel shuffle as QUBO problem

topOpportunities.description: Transition to ATF (chromium-coated zirconium or SiC cladding) for enhanced safety margins and higher burnup. Enables 24-month fuel cycles.
topOpportunities.roi: 10-15% fuel cost reduction, enhanced safety, extended outage cycles
implementation: Lead test assemblies (LTAs) in current reactor

topOpportunities.description: Deploy plant-specific LLM trained on all procedures, technical specs, and historical operations. Natural language interface for operators.
topOpportunities.roi: 50% reduction in procedure retrieval time, error reduction
implementation: Fine-tune LLM (Llama 2 70B or GPT-4) on plant documents
RAG system with vector database of procedures
Real-time context awareness of plant state
Audit trail and explainability for all suggestions

topOpportunities.opportunity: AI Vision for Autonomous Containment Inspection
topOpportunities.description: Deploy ground and aerial robots with computer vision for 24/7 containment structure monitoring. Detect micro-cracks, corrosion, and anomalies.
topOpportunities.roi: 70% reduction in manual inspection time, early defect detection
implementation: Boston Dynamics Spot robots with custom sensors
YOLOv8 + SegFormer models for defect detection

Carbon Capture.opportunity: Direct Air Capture Powered by Nuclear Heat
Carbon Capture.description: Install DAC plant using reactor thermal energy. Remove 1 million tons CO2/year while strengthening climate credentials.
implementation: Partner with Carbon Engineering or Climeworks
CO2 compression and pipeline to sequestration
Scale to multiple units over time

Additive Manufacturing.description: Install metal AM facility for rapid fabrication of replacement parts. Reduce supply chain dependencies and enable design optimizations.
Additive Manufacturing.roi: 50-70% reduction in part lead times, 30% cost savings
implementation: EOS M400 or similar metal 3D printer
Digital parts library with CAD models
ASME BPVC Section III certification process
